subject: [PATCH v8 07/15] mm: preserve RWP marker across PTE rewrites

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch ensures that the RWP (Read-Only Write-Protection) marker is preserved across PTE rewrites in various kernel paths, including swap, device-exclusive, migration, fork, and mprotect operations. Without this preservation, the RWP tracking could be silently dropped, leading to unexpected behavior when accessing pages with PAGE_NONE semantics. The patch updates several kernel functions to restore the RWP bit after modifying a PTE or PMD, ensuring that the marker is preserved across these operations.
